chart.searchString: sourcetype="torn" | eval intscale=if(scale==-9,"UNKNOWN", "SCALE"+tostring(scale)) | fields - scale | rename intscale as scale | chart count over year by scale
chart.title: tornado count v.s year

chart.searchString: sourcetype="torn" | eval intscale=if(scale==-9,"UNKNOWN", "SCALE"+tostring(scale)) | fields - scale | rename intscale as scale | chart count over month by scale
chart.title: tornado count v.s month

chart.searchString: sourcetype="torn" | eval intscale=if(scale==-9,"UNKNOWN", "SCALE"+tostring(scale)) | fields - scale | rename intscale as scale | chart count over hour by scale
chart.title: tornado count v.s time

chart.searchString: sourcetype="torn" | stats count by state | sort by count desc | head 5
chart.title: the top 5 tornado count state

table.searchString: sourcetype=torn | stats count(eval(scale=0)) AS SCALE0, count(eval(scale=1)) AS SCALE1 ,count(eval(scale=2)) AS SCALE2 ,count(eval(scale=3)) AS SCALE3, count(eval(scale=4)) AS SCALE4, count(eval(scale=5)) AS SCALE5, count(eval(scale=-9)) AS UNKNOWN, count AS COUNT by state | sort by COUNT desc | head 5 | fields - COUNT
table.title: the top 5 tornado count state v.s tornado scale

chart.searchString: sourcetype="torn" | eval temp =if(scale==-9,"UNKNOWN", "SCALE"+tostring(scale)) | fields - scale | rename temp as scale | stats avg(injuries) by scale
chart.title: the scale of tornado v.s average injuries

chart.searchString: sourcetype="torn" | eval temp =if(scale==-9,"UNKNOWN", "SCALE"+tostring(scale)) | fields - scale | rename temp as scale | stats avg(fatalities) by scale
chart.title: the scale of tornado v.s average fatalities
